description.value:
exocortex or weapon

Strikes from the modded exocortex or weapon disrupt technology. On a hit, Strikes cause a random tech item held by the target to gain the glitching 3 condition for 1 round. If the creature has the tech trait, the creature must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:resolve(@actor.abilities.int.mod + ternary(gte(@actor.level, 17), 6, ternary(gte(@actor.level, 9), 4, 2)) + @actor.level + 10)] save against your class DC.

Critical Success The creature is immune to your glitch pulse for 24 hours.

Success No effect.

Failure The creature is glitching 3 for 1 round.

Critical Failure The creature is glitching 3 for 1 minute.
